summary: Elric and his team are on a mission to protect the dragon, but they must first navigate through its powerful breath attacks. With precise timing, Elric's team manages to close the door to the dragon's chamber, giving them a chance to fight back and survive.
key_moments: The dragon unleashes its powerful breath attack, forcing Elric's team to take cover
Elric comes up with a plan to use his knowledge of the dragon's attacks to their advantage
The team successfully closes the door to the dragon's chamber, allowing them to fight back
